creator: ast@marabu.ch
text:
subject=Re: ports/29507: racoon-20010802a libipsec doesn't compile on RELENG_4
 
 Tony,
 
 Your suggestion to MFC -current (1.7) into -stable (1.4.2.2)
 for pfkeyv2.h worked for me:
 # cd /sys/net
 # cvs di -u -r1.4.2.2 -r1.7 pfkeyv2.h | patch
 It compiles now, but I haven't tested the new racoon.
